caption: Table 176. Document revision history
rows: Updated: – Section 3.9.1: Power supply schemes – Table 26: STM32U5Gxxx pin/ball definitions – Notes in Section 5.2: Absolute maximum ratings – Figure 56: NAND controller waveforms for read access – Figure 57: NAND controller waveforms for write access – Figure 74: USART timing diagram in SPI master mode – Figure 75: USART timing diagram in SPI slave mode – Table 78: Low-speed external user clock characteristics – Table 101: NRST pin characteristics – Master/slave terminology into "Controller/target" for I2C Added: – Sustainable technology logo in Features – Figure 25: HSI16 frequency versus temperature and V DD – SPI mode in Table 22: USART, UART, and LPUART features, Section 3.52.1: Universal synchronous/asynchronous receiver transmitter (USART/UART), and Section 5.3.41: USART (SPI mode) characteristics

Updated Table 2: STM32U5Gxxx features and peripheral counts. Updated Figure 3: Power-up /down sequence. Updated Table 26: STM32U5Gxxx pin/ball definitions. Updated Table 27: Alternate function AF0 to AF7. Updated Table 28: Alternate function AF8 to AF15. Updated Table 77: High-speed external user clock characteristics. Updated Table 79: HSE oscillator characteristics. Updated Figure 29: Recommended NRST pin protection. Updated Figure 52: Synchronous multiplexed NOR/PSRAM read timings. Updated Figure 54: Synchronous non-multiplexed NOR/PSRAM read timings. Added Section 6.1: Device marking and suppressed corresponding information from the package description sections.

Updated Table 133: WWDG min/max timeout value at 160 MHz (PCLK) Updated Table 2: STM32U5Gxxx features and peripheral counts Updated Table 111: Temperature sensor characteristics Updated Figure 27: I/O input characteristics (all I/Os except FT_c) title
Fixed Section 6: Package information issue wrongly introduced in revision 4.
